visualDirection: No prominent founder portrait above the fold
Split-path homepage that routes visitors immediately

homepage.headline: Don't get left behind in the AI era.
homepage.subhead: Whether you know exactly what you need or you're still figuring out where the opportunities are, Mozingo Systems has a clear path forward.

beforeAfter.title: What this actually looks like
beforeAfter.before: A call comes in during a job. It goes to voicemail. The customer calls the next business on Google.
beforeAfter.after: The call gets answered and the lead gets captured while you finish the job you're on.

closingCta.headline: Not sure which path is right?
closingCta.copy: Tell us what's going on. We'll point you to the most practical first step, no sales pitch, no obligation.

testimonial.title: What clients say
testimonial.quote: Frank is always pleasant and professional. Very knowledgeable and helpful whenever needed.
testimonial.attribution: Connie Welch, Non-profit Consulting client (LinkedIn recommendation)

trustSignals: Most products live in days, not months
Built for small and mid-size business
homepage.founderStrip: 30+ years across Navy sonar, Air Force avionics, semiconductor manufacturing, and enterprise data systems.

aiProducts.summary: Predefined AI products for narrow jobs. They answer, capture, or book without turning the whole business into a software project.
aiProducts.pricing: Most projects run $750-$2,500 to set up, plus $99-$249/month for maintenance.

offers.name: Phone
offers.headline: Never miss a call again.
offers.description: Calls get answered, qualified, and routed so you do not lose the lead while you are busy doing the actual work.
offers.howItWorks: AI or automation handles the first response, captures the details, and hands the call off when a real person needs to step in.

offers.name: Lead Capture
offers.headline: Keep inbound interest from slipping through the cracks.
offers.description: Collect contact details and qualifying information in a consistent way so inbound interest does not get lost between inboxes, forms, and follow-up gaps.
offers.howItWorks: AI or automation asks the right intake questions, records the answers, and routes the lead into the next system or inbox.

offers.name: Appointment Booking
offers.headline: Cut the back-and-forth out of scheduling.
offers.description: Let the system schedule, confirm, and manage the next step so your team spends less time coordinating calendars manually.
offers.howItWorks: AI or automation checks availability, captures the needed details, and books or adjusts the meeting inside your existing process.

operationsImprovement.summary: Start with an operations audit, then decide what to plan, implement, and maintain so the business runs with less friction.

about.headline: Frank Mozingo builds practical systems that reduce friction.
about.summary: Operations leadership, data systems, automation, software, and practical AI.

testimonials.quote: Frank is a problem solver. He has a knack for finding a technology solution that delivers for the customer, even if he must develop it himself. Frank is curious and a fast learner, quick to absorb new technologies and do what is needed to get the job done.
testimonials.attribution: Lance Lambert, Transformational Data Executive, former manager at Wolfspeed (LinkedIn recommendation)

testimonials.quote: Frank's technical expertise is exceptional - whether it's Snowflake, Power BI, Power Platform, or a range of other tools. Frank has become my go-to person for many applications. His attitude and professionalism are second to none.
testimonials.attribution: Victoria Quinn, Analytics Enablement Lead, Wolfspeed (LinkedIn recommendation)

contact.prompt: Tell me whether you need AI Products or Operations Improvement. I will reply with the most practical first step. I respond within one business day.
